text.message: Out of curiosity, anyone noticed a better 1st pick? unsure if I missed something...
i think your spot is good or the 5 10 4 i liked as well
Would’ve built road towards brick port tho and the 3-4 ore
Yep, I was looking at it, but I assumed 5/10/4 the sheep port or 8/10 goes, so it was kinda a dud
Sorry red, I figured you can back track to the wheat port
im just being greedy with that tbf lol
I was looking at 4/11 to the wheat port lol
Sorry sir I’ll take the chance. Otherwise he gets city
sorry it gives me a city as well
Yea but u have city and all the brick lol
I guess you have a dev
soz i thought it was black
Was it with me or ok?
He could've said who he wanted it from
i thought he would block you
nice steal, he got the brick
What’s wrong my my game it keeps crashing the text and my cards
Oj r u competing for grajn port ?
Ns is just me not stealing from you
Was giving brick as well lol
And you are ahead on knights
He has wool port and just got 6 wool lol
he can just city and dev
and red needs to keep army
i will try to take road
Red would’ve used knights by now
Give me settle i can keep army
Don't we think blue should get road over oj?
Only 14 knights in game and 11 already used
I need help getting road if that’s the case lol
Why do you need the settle to keep army? lol
blue has no brick would be tough
12 knights used. There’s 2 left so black can take
if that happens you win tho
black could have 2 vps or mono
Had to go for the knights lmao
i need help to take road
Just use all ur cards so no mono
I wish I had a mono
he will probs take road here and maybe win
can you mono his wood or something?
I got mono I’ll pull it
so you mean you don't have a knight?
Red if u don’t have knight… black has it
if you think I have a knight its because you don't. which means you have all the cool stuff
So oj has a mono or yop
red has a mono or yop as well, and 3 vps
so oj on 9, red on 8, blue on 7 and im on 7
Red tunneled on me hard though
Sry man i had to keep my army
Any chance I can get a sheep or wood?
Im a man of my word
so its between red and I
But that's not the block lol
I have option of only city
so uhhhh anyone trynna help me extend for part of a city lol
Hey man I just gave you 2 ore
you needed me just as much as I needed you lmao
except oj tho if he gets back road its gg
